summary: Affiliate Qualification-Based Application with Token Activation testing complete. Backend: 23/25 tests passed (92%). Frontend: Fixed critical import error in AffiliateActivatePage.jsx. All core features working: 5-section qualification form, token-based activation, admin approval/rejection, WhatsApp tracking, Settings Hub integration.

minor.issue: Duplicate activation returns 'Invalid or expired activation link' instead of 'Account already activated' - acceptable behavior since token is cleared after first use
Some older applications don't have 'id' field - legacy data issue, new applications have correct structure

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AffiliateActivatePage.jsx had incorrect import paths (../components/ui/button instead of @/components/ui/button) - fixed during testing
Qualification form has all 5 sections: Personal Info, Online Presence, Promotion Strategy, Commitment, Agreement
Fit score calculation working: High (6+ points), Medium (3-5 points), Low (<3 points) based on audience_size, prior_experience, expected_monthly_sales, willing_to_promote_weekly
Token activation flow: 48-hour expiry, single-use tokens, bcrypt password hashing
WhatsApp activation tracking: activation_whatsapp_opened flag updated when admin clicks Send via WhatsApp
Settings Hub has affiliate_emails section with send_application_received/approved/rejected toggles and sla_response_text

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages loading correctly after import fix

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test applications during backend testing (prefixed with test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate application system redesigned from simple form to 5-section qualification form. Key routes: Public apply at /partners/apply, Activation at /activate?token=XYZ, Admin applications at /admin/affiliate-applications, Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub (Affiliate Policy tab has Affiliate Email Settings section). Approval flow: Admin approves -> activation token generated (48h expiry) -> email + WhatsApp link sent -> user clicks link -> sets password -> account activated -> can login. Fit score shown in admin table: High/Medium/Low based on audience size, experience, expected sales.

details: 5 sections: Personal Info, Online Presence, Promotion Strategy, Commitment, Agreement
GET /api/affiliate-applications/stats - returns pending, approved, rejected, active_affiliates, max_affiliates, slots_remaining
POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/approve - creates affiliate, user account, generates activation token
POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/reject - sets status to rejected, sends rejection email
Admin notes stored and shown in status check
Login fails for approved but not activated accounts (password_hash is empty)
/activate - Password creation form with error handling
/admin/affiliate-applications - Table with fit score, qualification summary in drawer, activation status tracking
